data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: UI elements are large enough and positioned to reduce the time to interact with them effectively.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies navigation and decision-making by minimizing options presented at any given time.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs align with user expectations by utilizing familiar patterns users encounter regularly.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related elements closely together to make relationships clear.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing interfaces that improve perceived usability and user satisfaction.
